text:
9 PRs merged this week.

We added drop-in OpenAI compatibility for image generation—just swap the base URL and you're good. Plugged in new Pruna models (image, edit, video), and fixed nanobanana-2 so your custom sizes actually fit the box you want.

Also cleaned up some API key weirdness and made pollen costs use fixed-point notation so they don't look like floating-point math homework anymore. 

Code is open, endpoints are live. Go build something weird. 🐝✨

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #webdev #generativeai #buildinpublic #api
